pi_items.source: Verified via setup_task.sh: project is copied to this location during task setup
Verified via env.json mounts: examples/android_studio_env/data is mounted to /workspace/data at runtime
Verified by examining FeedReaderApp project structure: app/src/main/java/com/example/feedreader exists with all required classes

pi_items.verified_value: 1.7.3 (released October 7, 2023; current latest is 1.10.2 as of April 8, 2025)
pi_items.source: Verified via Maven Central and GitHub releases that 1.7.3 is a valid historical release, but significantly outdated
Verified by file inspection: FetchArticlesTask.kt, SaveArticleTask.kt, SearchArticlesTask.kt, LoadSavedTask.kt all exist in app/src/main/java/com/example/feedreader/task/

pi_items.verified_value: Verified for FetchArticlesTask which extends AsyncTask<String, Void, List<Article>?>() with @Suppress("DEPRECATION")
pi_items.source: File inspection of FetchArticlesTask.kt confirms AsyncTask extension and deprecation marking

pi_items.metadata_value: FeedActivity and SearchActivity call execute() on AsyncTask classes
pi_items.verified_value: Verified: FeedActivity contains fetchTask!!.execute(category) and SaveArticleTask().execute(article) calls
pi_items.source: File inspection of FeedActivity.kt lines 77 and 86 show deprecated AsyncTask.execute() calls

pi_items.verified_value: Verified: Methods like fetchByCategory(), search(), saveArticle() all use Thread.sleep() to simulate I/O blocking
pi_items.source: ArticleRepository.kt inspection shows all methods are synchronous with Thread.sleep() calls simulating I/O latency

privileged_info_summary: The FeedReaderApp is a synthetic Android project at package com.example.feedreader containing four AsyncTask-based classes (FetchArticlesTask, SaveArticleTask, SearchArticlesTask, LoadSavedTask) that require migration to Kotlin Coroutines. The task recommends adding kotlinx-coroutines-android version 1.7.3 (released October 2023), which is approximately 18 months outdated compared to the current latest version 1.10.2 (April 2025). The project is set up at /home/ga/AndroidStudioProjects/FeedReaderApp from a mounted data source, with Activities in FeedActivity and SearchActivity making direct execute() calls on the deprecated AsyncTask classes, and repository methods currently implemented as blocking synchronous functions.
